gamelift.script.s3location.CfnAbout: The location in Amazon S3 where build or script files can be stored for access by Amazon GameLift.

gamelift.script.s3location.Bucket.Description: An Amazon S3 bucket identifier. This is the name of the S3 bucket.  GameLift currently does not support uploading from Amazon S3 buckets with names that contain a dot (.).

gamelift.script.s3location.Key.Description: The name of the zip file that contains the build files or script files.

gamelift.script.s3location.ObjectVersion.Description: The version of the file, if object versioning is turned on for the bucket. Amazon Web Services uses this information when retrieving files from an S3 bucket that you own. Use this parameter to specify a specific version of the file. If not set, the latest version of the file is retrieved.

gamelift.script.s3location.RoleArn.Description: The Amazon Resource Name ([ARN](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonS3/latest/dev/s3-arn-format.html)) for an IAM role that allows Amazon Web Services to access the S3 bucket.
